savedquery.name: My Pending Reviews
savedquery.description: Applications currently pending review at any stage
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowanceapplication"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_applicationType" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_aiValidationScore" /> <attribute name="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="in"> <value>720000013</value> <!-- Equipment Leader Review --> <value>720000014</value> <!-- Director Review --> </condition> </filter> <order attribute="createdon" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowanceapplicationid"> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_applicationType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_status" width="160" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_aiValidationScore" width="90" /> <cell name="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" width="100" /> <cell name="createdon" width="120" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: AI Flagged — Needs Review
savedquery.description: Applications where AI could not fully validate documents (score below threshold or flags raised)
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowanceapplication"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_applicationType" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <attribute name="va_aiValidationScore" /> <attribute name="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" operator="eq" value="0" /> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="in"> <value>720000012</value> <!-- AI Review --> <value>720000013</value> <!-- Equipment Leader Review --> </condition> </filter> <order attribute="va_aiValidationScore" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowanceapplicationid"> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_applicationType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_status" width="160" /> <cell name="va_aiValidationScore" width="90" /> <cell name="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" width="100" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: Employee Profiles
savedquery.description: Employee-centric profile view. Open a row to see full application data, uploaded documents, and audit history.
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowanceapplication"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_personnelNumber" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_applicantJobTitle" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <attribute name="va_applicationType" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_effectiveDate" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="va_applicantName" descending="false" /> <order attribute="createdon" descending="true" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_applicantName" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowanceapplicationid"> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="170" /> <cell name="va_personnelNumber" width="110" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="140" /> <cell name="va_applicantJobTitle" width="170" /> <cell name="va_status" width="160" /> <cell name="va_applicationType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_effectiveDate" width="110" /> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="createdon" width="120" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: All Applications
savedquery.description: All applications across all statuses and types
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowanceapplication"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_applicationType" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" /> <attribute name="va_aiValidationScore" /> <attribute name="va_aiAutoApprovalEligible" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="createdon" descending="true" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowanceapplicationid"> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_applicationType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_status" width="160" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" width="100" /> <cell name="va_aiValidationScore" width="90" /> <cell name="createdon" width="120" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: Active
savedquery.description: Applications that have been fully approved and are active or pending payroll
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_allowanceapplication"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" /> <attribute name="va_applicationType" /> <attribute name="va_status" /> <attribute name="va_allowanceLevel" /> <attribute name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" /> <attribute name="va_effectiveDate" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="in"> <value>720000016</value> <!-- Payroll Notification --> <value>720000017</value> <!-- Active --> </condition> </filter> <order attribute="va_effectiveDate" descending="true" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_allowanceapplicationid"> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="va_applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="va_applicantCompany" width="130" /> <cell name="va_applicationType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_status" width="160" /> <cell name="va_allowanceLevel" width="80" /> <cell name="va_monthlyAllowanceAmount" width="100" /> <cell name="va_effectiveDate" width="110" /> </row> </grid>
